Quality Education.reason: Focus on understanding ancient Japanese grammar supports Target 4.7 ('knowledge and skills for sustainable development').

Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and specialized skills, promoting appreciation of cultural diversity and heritage through literature and historical documents (Target 4.7).
evidence: Course Department:Master Program in Japan Studies/M/1&2
習得日語古典文法之基礎知識
奠定處理日治時代文獻以及日本古代文獻資料能力

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The study of "日本古典文學" (Japanese classical literature) and historical documents can indirectly support the promotion of local culture, which is relevant to sustainable tourism (Target 8.9).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course builds skills to read "日本古代文獻資料" (ancient Japanese documents), directly supporting Target 11.4's goal to protect and safeguard the world's cultural heritage.
evidence: 奠定處理日治時代文獻以及日本古代文獻資料能力

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: By enabling the study of "台日政治史等相關文獻" (Taiwan-Japan political history documents), the course can contribute to historical understanding, indirectly supporting peace and justice.
evidence: 台日政治史等相關文獻
